findings.explanation: Missing allowed-tools grants unlimited access. Skill needs Bash (gh, jira, git, python3), Read, AskUserQuestionTool. Without declaration, also gets WebFetch, MCP (beyond atlassian), Write, etc. No malicious use detected. Recommend: allowed-tools: Bash(gh:*), Bash(jira:*), Bash(git:*), Bash(python3:*), Read, AskUserQuestionTool

Reads Claude session history (.jsonl files). This is sensitive data (session logs) but is the core stated purpose. Access is consent-gated — user must approve. Script only extracts titles, files, commands — not conversation content.
MCP reference is coherent with stated Jira integration purpose. Used as detection check, not for data exfiltration.
